title: Kidnapping in Cheraw: Woman Safe, Suspect Sought
summary: A woman was found safe after being kidnapped in Cheraw. The suspect is still at large. Police advise caution.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of community vigilance and the ongoing efforts of law enforcement to apprehend dangerous individuals.

title: Charlotte Weather: Cooler Tuesday, Warm-up Ahead
summary: A cooler Tuesday will be followed by a warm-up, with record-breaking heat expected by Friday.
charlotte_impact: Provides a brief weather update, useful for planning daily activities and preparing for temperature changes.

title: Arrest Made in Fatal Hit-and-Run on The Plaza
summary: Thomas Haynes was arrested after a hit-and-run in Charlotte resulted in the death of a 23-year-old woman and injuries to two others.
charlotte_impact: Addresses the consequences of reckless driving and the pursuit of justice for victims of vehicular crimes.

title: CMS to Outline Proposed 2026-27 Budget
summary: Charlotte-Mecklenburg Schools will detail their budget priorities for the next fiscal year, including teacher pay and school operations.

title: Pineville Apartment Fire Injures One
summary: One person was injured in an apartment fire on Willow Run Road in Pineville early this morning.

title: Mother Speaks Out Against Suspect in Homicide Case

title: Power Outage Impacts Concord Mills, I-85 Exit
